case_title: LILY YU VS. DONGWEI XUE ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-15-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-15-2025 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF LILY YU. DEFENDANT SHANG HONG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DONGWEI XUE NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY YU, LILY AS TO DEFENDANT XUE, DONGWEI HONG, SHAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-15-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $102.00 SERVED DEC-12-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HONG, SHAN
STIPULATION TO USE A JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY YU, LILY HONG, SHAN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $ 102.00 SERVED DEC-13-2024, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT XUE, DONGWEI
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-15-2025 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YU, LILY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT XUE, DONGWEI HONG, SHAN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
